description: A cut of pork from the loin, usually cooked by grilling, pan-searing, baking, or frying and served as a main protein with sides.
preparation_steps: Cook by grilling, pan-searing, baking, or frying until properly cooked.
Serve with vegetables, potatoes, salad, or sauce as desired.

nutrition.carbohydrates: Low unless breaded or served with sauce

health_advice.benefits: A good source of protein and can be part of a balanced meal when paired with vegetables.
health_advice.risks: Fat and sodium can increase significantly if heavily fried, breaded, or served with salty sauces.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose leaner cuts when possible and pair with vegetables rather than heavy fried sides.

dietary_notes.note: Gluten-free suitability depends on seasoning mixes, sauces, and whether the chop is breaded.

allergens: Possible milk if cooked with butter or creamy sauce
